Wholesale & B2B Systems · Mivan Global Ltd

MAKE WHOLESALE ORDERINGFASTER AND CLEANER.

We build digital systems for wholesalers, importers, and distributors who need live stock visibility, customer-specific pricing, faster ordering, better reporting, and stronger control over sales and inventory.

Build My Wholesale PortalDiscuss B2B Requirements
B2B Portal
Live Stock · Trade Ordering

What We Build

WHOLESALE SYSTEMSWE DELIVER.

🛒
ORDERING

B2B Ordering Portal

Allow trade customers to browse products, see live stock, place orders, and access invoices online — replacing phone orders and manual stock checks.

💰
PRICING

Customer-Specific Pricing

Create pricing tiers, special rates, account-based discounts, and customer group pricing so each trade customer sees the right price.

📋
CATALOGUE

Live Stock Catalogue

Show available products, cases, pallets, short-date items, new arrivals, and promotional stock with real-time availability.

👤
SALES REP

Sales Rep Tools

Give sales reps access to customer accounts, order history, live pricing, and order placement tools when visiting customers or working remotely.

📦
PURCHASING

Purchase Order Planning

Track supplier orders, expected arrivals, container loads, cost prices, and reorder requirements to keep stock flowing.

📊
ACCOUNTS

Credit & Statement Reporting

Show outstanding balances, payment history, credit notes, aged balances, and account statements to customers and internal teams.

⚡
CLEARANCE

Short-Date Clearance Tools

Create clearance catalogues and promotional product lists quickly from selected stock to move short-date or slow-moving items.

🔗
DROPSHIPPING

Dropshipping Integration

Allow selected inventory to be made available to approved resellers and dropshippers, extending your sales channels without extra manual work.

Common Problems We Solve

IF ANY OF THESE SOUND FAMILIAR.

📞

Customers call or message for stock manually

📄

Sales reps use outdated price lists

❓

Stock is not visible in real time

📊

Purchase orders are tracked in spreadsheets

💳

Credit notes and statements are hard to manage

⏱️

Short-date products are slow to promote

🔌

Marketplace and wholesale stock are not connected

📤

Stock cannot easily be shared with dropshippers

Ready to Digitise?

BUILD A SMARTER WHOLESALE OPERATION.

Let's replace phone orders, spreadsheets, and manual stock checks with a connected B2B system your customers and team will actually use.
